item.title: Report: Rep. Neal Dunn to Retire Early, Shrinking GOP Majority
item.description: Rep. Neal Dunn, R-Fla., is reportedly preparing to announce an early retirement next week - a development that could further complicate life for House...

item.title: NYPD Seeks OK From Trump Admin to Down Drones
item.description: The New York Police Department is urging the Trump administration to grant it authority to disable drones over the nation's largest city, warning that...

item.title: Lawyer for Dem Legislator Warns Pirro After Grand Jury Rejects Indictment

item.title: Trump on Iran: Told Netanyahu Diplomatic Outcome Preferred

item.title: Army Signs $5.2M Deal for New Counter-Drone System
item.description: American troops facing the growing threat of drone swarms on future battlefields will soon have a new defensive weapon: a small, low-cost interceptor ...
